_comment: 传说之剑 — 下界合金剑，Sharpness X + 多属性 + 自定义名称和Lore，需所有炉灶 + 高燃

result.nbt: {display:{Name:'{"text":"天焰斩","color":"gold","bold":true,"italic":false}',Lore:['{"text":"锻造于下界熔炉之心","color":"dark_red","italic":false}','{"text":"每一击皆燃烧命运","color":"red","italic":false}','{"text":"[ 传说·唯一 ]","color":"dark_gray","italic":false}']},Enchantments:[{id:"minecraft:sharpness",lvl:10s},{id:"minecraft:fire_aspect",lvl:3s},{id:"minecraft:unbreaking",lvl:5s},{id:"minecraft:mending",lvl:1s},{id:"minecraft:looting",lvl:3s},{id:"minecraft:sweeping",lvl:3s}],AttributeModifiers:[{AttributeName:"generic.attack_damage",Name:"generic.attack_damage",Amount:30.0d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-1000001,0,0,1],Slot:"mainhand"},{AttributeName:"generic.attack_speed",Name:"generic.attack_speed",Amount:2.4d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-1000002,0,0,2],Slot:"mainhand"},{AttributeName:"generic.max_health",Name:"generic.max_health",Amount:10.0d,Operation:0,UUID:[I;-1000003,0,0,3],Slot:"mainhand"}]}

jei_description: §6需要下界炉灶（任意火焰）+ 高燃 + 60点热量。
§c攻击伤害 +30 / 攻击速度 +2.4 / 最大生命 +10❤
§7附魔：锋利X·烈焰III·耐久V·经验修补·抢夺III·横扫之刃III
